name: French-Style Cream Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the cream cheese, margarine or butter, garlic, parsley, water, white wine vinegar, Worchestershire sauce, Herbes de Provence, and seasoning salt. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
2. To serve, garnish with fresh thyme if desired. Serve with crackers.
Herbes de Provence: In a small storage container, combine 1 tbsp dried marjoram, 1 tbsp dried thyme, 1 tbsp dried savory, 1 tbsp dried basil, 1 tbsp dried rosemary, 1/2 tbsp dried sage, and 1/2 tbsp dried fennel seed. Store in an airtight container. Crush before using.
Makes: 1 1/3 cups
Source: Good Housekeeping Magazine, Dec. 1992
Calories: 58 per tablespoon; 6 gm fat; 1 gm protein; 72 mg sodium
